user.title: Add your Pixoo 64
user.description: Show your Claude usage on a Divoom Pixoo 64. Make sure the panel is on your network and 'LAN control' is enabled in the Divoom app.

data_description.name: Friendly name for this Pixoo in Home Assistant.
data_description.ip_address: Local IP of the Pixoo, e.g. 192.168.1.50. Find it in the Divoom app under Device settings.

error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach the Pixoo at that address. Check the IP and that 'LAN control' is on in the Divoom app.

abort.already_configured: This Pixoo is already set up.

init.title: Pixoo Claude settings
init.description: Choose what the panel shows and how bright it is.

data.cloud_when_idle: Use the cloud channel when idle
data.flash_threshold: Flash a bar at or above this %

data_description.ip_address: Change this if your Pixoo's IP has moved.
data_description.claude_enabled: Master switch. When off, the panel is handed back to the Divoom cloud channel instead of holding a stale frame.
data_description.cloud_when_idle: When there's no active session (usage at 0%), switch to the Divoom cloud channel and return automatically once usage picks up.
data_description.invert: Display how much is left (100 − used %) rather than how much has been used. Bars still turn red as you run low.
data_description.flash_threshold: A bar blinks once usage reaches this percentage (a 100%/FULL bar always flashes). Set to 100 to only flash when maxed.
data_description.dance: Give the Claude mascot a gentle idle bob. Pauses while a bar is flashing so the alert stays clear.
data_description.page_seconds: How long each page (Claude usage, then each monitored sensor) stays on screen before rotating.
data_description.alert_priority: When a monitored sensor crosses its alert threshold, show only the breached sensor(s) until they clear, instead of waiting for their turn in the rotation.
data_description.show_clock: Show the current time in the top-right of the header.

error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach the Pixoo at that address. Check the IP and that 'LAN control' is on in the Divoom app.

error.invalid_monitor_config: Check the monitored sensor settings and try again.
error.invalid_range: Maximum value must be greater than minimum value.
error.threshold_range: In Percentage mode, the alert threshold must be between 0 and 100.

user.title: Add monitored sensor
user.description: Show a sensor as a rotating page on the panel, with an optional alert when it crosses a threshold.

data_description.label: Label shown above the bar. Defaults to the entity name.
data_description.min_value: Sensor value that maps to 0% on the bar.
data_description.max_value: Sensor value that maps to 100% on the bar.
data_description.value_type: Show a percentage or the raw sensor value under the bar.
data_description.unit: Unit suffix for raw display. Leave blank to use the entity's own unit.
data_description.threshold: Flash the bar at or above this. In Percentage mode enter 0-100; in Raw value mode enter the raw value. Set to 0 for no alert.
data_description.icon: Small icon shown next to the label.
data_description.color: Accent color for the icon and label (the bar keeps its danger color).

reconfigure.title: Edit monitored sensor
reconfigure.description: Update the settings for this monitored sensor.

data_description.label: Label shown above the bar. Defaults to the entity name.
data_description.min_value: Sensor value that maps to 0% on the bar.
data_description.max_value: Sensor value that maps to 100% on the bar.
data_description.value_type: Show a percentage or the raw sensor value under the bar.
data_description.unit: Unit suffix for raw display. Leave blank to use the entity's own unit.
data_description.threshold: Flash the bar at or above this. In Percentage mode enter 0-100; in Raw value mode enter the raw value. Set to 0 for no alert.
data_description.icon: Small icon shown next to the label.
data_description.color: Accent color for the icon and label (the bar keeps its danger color).
